expo.name: RunCheck
expo.description: Find and join basketball pickup games nearby in real-time. Check in at gyms, see who's playing, and build your reliability score.

infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: RunCheck sends notifications for runs at your gyms and activity from players you follow.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RunCheck uses your camera to record and share game clips.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RunCheck uses your microphone to record audio with your game clips.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RunCheck uses your photo library to let you share images on your profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: RunCheck saves your recorded game clips to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RunCheck uses your location to find nearby gyms and prompt you to check in when you arrive.
